name: YNX Resource Market
knownLimitations: The provider/buyer Web UI covers provider continuity, quote/intent, sealed reverse/batch auctions, worker-key, execution, dispute and receipt actions. A 143-string draft catalog is structurally browser-tested in 12 locales and settlement-boundary terms are manually reviewed; full linguistic review, interpolated notices and server-originated errors remain incomplete.

The Android debug client implements the canonical SDK response callback, central challenge request, Android Keystore P-256 device proof and replay-resistant per-request Product Session proofs. Missing Wallet handler and malformed callbacks fail closed; live completion remains unproven until central routes are merged.
No live central Wallet/Gateway or authoritative public settlement endpoint is connected.
A current Android debug APK is installed and cold-started on an Android 16 emulator; iOS installation, production signature, public deployment and hosted download are not proven.
Local capacity evidence covers matching reads only and does not establish public or settlement capacity.
